name: rr-table
summary: Structural data table (CSS table layout + ARIA table roles) owning zebra, hover, and selected row states for the whole family.

slots.name: header
slots.description: A single rr-table-row of header cells (rr-table-cell header).

rules: Never use hex values. Always use var(--color-*) semantic tokens
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
Always set label — it names the table for assistive tech
Set interactive only when rows actually respond to clicks — the hover tint is an interactivity signal, never decoration

examples.title: Zebra table
examples.html:
<rr-table label="Rules" zebra>
  <rr-table-row slot="header">
    <rr-table-cell header>Rule</rr-table-cell>
    <rr-table-cell header numeric>Amount</rr-table-cell>
  </rr-table-row>
  <rr-table-row>
    <rr-table-cell>High-value approvals</rr-table-cell>
    <rr-table-cell numeric>25,000</rr-table-cell>
  </rr-table-row>
</rr-table>

keyboard: Interactive content inside cells (menus, buttons, links) keeps its own keyboard behavior; the table adds none
rules: The host carries role=table with aria-label from the label prop; shadow rowgroups carry role=rowgroup
Because layout is CSS tables (not <table>), the explicit ARIA roles on host/rows/cells are the semantics — do not remove them
